caribbean.headline: Roatan faces moderate seas as Caribbean weather stabilizes
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing 21 kt winds with 5.1 ft significant wave heights and ENE swell at 7 second periods, creating moderate conditions for vessel operations in the western Caribbean today. With 50% rain probability and Freeport showing lighter 16 kt winds, this system remains well within manageable parameters for cruise operations across both regions.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Braces for Rain and Moderate Seas Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is tracking 75% rain probability with westerly swells reaching 4.3 feet and winds holding at 19 knots, creating choppy conditions across the Central Mediterranean. Mykonos in the Eastern Mediterranean faces slightly stronger winds at 23 knots, making today a day for careful route planning and passenger comfort management throughout the region.
